content.speakerText: So far, we're 85% on track—delayed a bit on the UX phase, but dev's caught up.
content.speakerTextCn: 目前我们进度85%，UI/UX稍有延迟，但开发团队已经追回来了。

options.text: We're behind schedule and can't catch up.
We're ahead on backend delivery and hit all sprint goals. UX delay was minor and already mitigated.
The project is canceled due to delays.
We didn't start the UX phase yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了用数据支撑进度（85% on track），并突出解决问题的能力（delay was minor and already mitigated）。干扰项1和3是消极回应，不符合积极汇报的语境；干扰项4与对话内容矛盾，因为UX阶段已启动但延迟。

content.speakerText: Can you give me a quick update on the Q3 product rollout?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能简要汇报一下Q3产品上线的进展吗？

options.text: I think maybe it's going okay?
We've completed all core features ahead of schedule, and user testing is on track for next week.
I'm not sure, ask the marketing team.
The project is too big to update right now.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体成果（completed all core features ahead of schedule）和进度说明（on track），符合进度汇报的专业标准。干扰项1和3缺乏信息量，干扰项4推卸责任，都不符合高效汇报的要求。

content.speakerText: How’s the migration to the new cloud platform going?
content.speakerTextCn: 迁移到新云平台的进展如何？

options.text: It’s been a disaster so far.
We're 90% complete with the migration, and no critical issues have arisen so far.
I don't know anything about cloud platforms.
We started last month, but nothing’s done yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了量化数据（90% complete）和风险控制信息（no critical issues），体现专业汇报素养。干扰项1过于负面，干扰项3和4缺乏基本责任感，不符合职场沟通规范。

content.template: We're ___ on track with the project, but UX had a minor delay.
content.hint: 用具体百分比表达进度，体现数据支撑能力
content.knowledgePoint: 使用具体数据表达项目进度

content.template: We've ___ all sprint goals ahead of schedule.
content.hint: 在敏捷开发中，完成冲刺目标的常用搭配

content.template: The delay was minor and already ___.
content.hint: 表示‘已解决/缓解’问题的正式动词
content.knowledgePoint: 项目汇报中的问题解决表达：mitigate

expectedAnswers: We're 85% on track. UX was delayed but dev caught up—no impact on launch.
Overall, we're ahead on backend and have hit every sprint goal. The UX delay was minor and already resolved.
On track with minor adjustments—everything’s under control and we’re confident about the deadline.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明当前进度与关键问题
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了项目汇报关键词如 on track, delay, mitigated, caught up
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个进度相关关键词（如 on track, caught up, resolved）

content.speakerText: What’s the status of the new feature rollout?
content.speakerTextCn: 新功能上线的进展如何？
expectedAnswers: We've completed 90% of development and started user testing. No major bugs found so far.
The rollout is on schedule—we finished coding ahead of time and QA is running smoothly.
All core features are live in staging. We're waiting for final sign-off from product team.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明当前阶段（开发/测试/上线）
语言准确性：使用了正确动词如 completed, started, finished, running
表达自然度：语气自信、专业，避免模糊表达如 'I think' 或 'maybe'
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个项目关键词（如 on schedule, completed, QA, staging）

content.speakerText: Any risks or blockers we should know about?
content.speakerTextCn: 有什么潜在风险或障碍需要我们注意吗？
expectedAnswers: No major blockers—just a small delay in third-party API integration, but we have a workaround in place.
We're monitoring a potential resource constraint next week, but we've already scheduled backup staff.
All clear so far. We're ahead on timeline and have contingency plans ready for any delays.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动识别并说明风险及应对方案
语言准确性：使用了专业表达如 blockers, workaround, contingency plan, monitoring
表达自然度：语气积极，强调解决方案而非问题本身
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个风险应对关键词（如 workaround, contingency plan, monitoring）
